patch.value: Remove dead code and dedupe pm-cli version readers into resolvePmCliVersion

Removed a dead IIFE in runtime-schema.ts, unused exports NESTED_SETTING_KEYS and _backgroundRefreshInternals; extracted resolvePmCliVersion in core/packages/root.ts to dedupe 4 copy-pasted package.json version readers (main.ts banner, sentry release, upgrade check, MCP serverInfo) and dropped now-unused fs/path imports from the main.ts hot path. Found by code-quality audit (F3/F4).
Shipped: removed dead IIFE + 2 unused exports; added resolvePmCliVersion dedup across 4 readers; dropped unused fs/path imports in main.ts.
